changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api (id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, `security`, parameters, request_body, responses, description, `version`, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, name, '["NHSV_ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[[{"in":"path","name":"marketType","schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"marketType"},{"in":"path","name":"ranking","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true,"description":"ranking"},{"in":"path","name":"period","schema":{"type":"number"},"required":true,"description":"period"},{"in":"path","name":"pageNumber","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"pageNumber"},{"in":"path","name":"pageSize","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"pageSize"}]]', '[]', '{"200":{"data":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"timestamp":{"type":"string"},"status":{"type":"number"},"message":{"type":"string"},"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"username":{"type":"string"},"accountNumber":{"type":"string"},"subNumber":{"type":"string"},"marketLeaderId":{"type":"number"},"marketLeaderUsername":{"type":"string"},"marketLeaderFullname":{"type":"string"},"marketLeaderStatus":{"type":"string"},"subscribedDateTime":{"type":"string"},"unsubscribedDateTime":{"type":"string"},"copyTradingStatus":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}},"description":"OK"},"401":{"description":"Your access token is invalid or expired"}}', 'NHSV API GET STOCK RANKING PERIOD', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'NHSV_API_GET_STOCK_RANKING_PERIOD';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_API_GET_STOCK_RANKING_PERIOD' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC';
